quality.rationale: 弯曲时空达朗贝尔算子展开结合球谐函数分离变量推导一维有效势波动方程，逻辑链条完整且可推广至任意静态球对称背景。

origin.question:
15.19. A scalar field satisfies $\square \Phi = 0$ . Show that in the Schwarzschild geometry $\Phi$ can be decomposed into spherical harmonic components $(Y_{\ell_m} = 	ext{spherical harmonic})$ as
$$
\Phi = \mathbf {\boldsymbol {r}}^{- 1} \psi (\mathbf {\boldsymbol {r}}, t) \mathbf {\boldsymbol {Y}}_{\ell_{\mathrm {m}}} (\theta , \phi)
$$
where $\psi$ satisfies
$$
\begin{array}{l}
\psi_{, \mathrm {t t}} - (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) [ (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) \psi_{, \mathrm {r}} ],_{\mathrm {r}} + \mathrm {V}_{\varrho} (\mathrm {r}) \psi = 0 \\
\mathrm {V}_{\ell} (\mathrm {r}) \equiv (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) \left[ \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}^{3}} + \frac {\ell (\ell + 1)}{\mathrm {r}^{2}} \right]. \\
\end{array}
$$
origin.solution:
Solution 15.19. The form of $\square \Phi$ for a diagonal metric is
$$
\square \Phi = 
abla \cdot (
abla \Phi) = (- \mathrm {g})^{-  rac {1}{2}} \left[ (- \mathrm {g})^{ rac {1}{2}} \mathrm {g}^{\alpha  eta} \Phi_{,  eta}ight], a 	ag {1}
$$
$$
\begin{array}{l}
\square \Phi = (- \mathbf {g})^{-  rac {1}{2}} \left[ \left\{\left(- \mathbf {g}\right)^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathbf {g}^{0 0} \Phi ,_{0} \right\},_{0} + \left\{\left(- \mathbf {g}\right)^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathbf {g}^{\mathrm {r r}} \Phi ,_{\mathrm {r}} \right\},_{\mathrm {r}} \right.
\tag {2} \\
+ \{(- g)^{\frac {1}{2}} g^{\theta} \theta \Phi , \theta \}, \theta + \{(- g)^{\frac {1}{2}} g^{\phi} \phi \Phi , \phi \}, \phi \rbrack . \\
\end{array}
$$
In the Schwarzschild metric, curvature coordinates,
$$
\mathrm {g}^{0 0} = - \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right)^{- 1}, \quad \mathrm {g}^{\mathrm {r r}} = \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right) \tag {3}
$$
and $\mathbf{g}^{	heta 	heta}$ and $\mathbf{g}^{\phi \phi}$ have their flat space form. It is clear that the third and fourth terms of Equation (2) have their flat space form (with flat space angular operator $\mathbf{L}^2$ ), and thus, Equation (2) has the form
$$
\square \Phi = - \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right)^{- 1} \Phi ,_{0 0} + \frac {1}{\mathrm {r}^{2}} \left[ \mathrm {r}^{2} \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right) \Phi ,_{\mathrm {r}} \right],_{\mathrm {r}} + \frac {\mathrm {L}^{2} \Phi}{\mathrm {r}^{2}}. \tag {4}
$$
The field equations $\square \Phi = 0$ then imply that
$$
0 = \Phi ,_{0 0} - \frac {1}{r^{2}} \left(1 - \frac {2 M}{r}\right) \left[ r^{2} \left(1 - \frac {2 M}{r}\right) \Phi ,_{r} \right],_{r} - \frac {L^{2}}{r^{2}} \left(1 - \frac {2 M}{r}\right) \Phi . \tag {5}
$$
Let $\Phi$ have the form
$$
\Phi = \frac {1}{r} \psi (r, t) Y_{\ell m} (\theta , \phi). \tag {6}
$$
Substituting Equation (6) into Equation (5), we have
$$
\psi_{, 0 0} - \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right) \left[ \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right) \psi_{, \mathrm {r}} \right]_{, \mathrm {r}} + \mathrm {V}_{\ell} (\mathrm {r}) \psi = 0 \tag {7a}
$$
where
$$
\mathrm {V}_{\ell} (\mathrm {r}) = \left(1 - \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}}\right) \left[ \frac {2 \mathrm {M}}{\mathrm {r}^{3}} + \frac {\ell (\ell + 1)}{\mathrm {r}^{2}} \right] \quad . \tag {7b}.
$$

killing_vectors.name: time_translation
killing_vectors.description: 时间平移 Killing 矢量 (∂_t)，对应能量守恒

killing_vectors.name: rot_phi
killing_vectors.description: 绕 φ 轴旋转 Killing 矢量 (∂_φ)，对应角动量守恒
